message:
fix(lab): gate tracing test helpers on tracing-integration feature

The oracle module's test helpers (RecordedEvent, EventFieldVisitor,
EventRecorder, and their trait impls) depend on the tracing and
tracing_subscriber crates which are only available when the
tracing-integration feature is enabled.  Without these gates, the
tests fail to compile on builds that exclude tracing support.

Adds #[cfg(feature = "tracing-integration")] to:
  - BTreeMap, Subscriber, Field/Visit, Layer, Context, LookupSpan imports
  - RecordedEvent struct and EventFieldVisitor struct + Visit impl
  - EventRecorder struct and Layer impl

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
